recommendations.title: The Hitcher II: I've Been Waiting
recommendations.overview: A sadistic serial killer terrorizes a couple driving on a rural highway in Texas while killing numerous people and framing them for his killings.

recommendations.title: Retroactive
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Thriller, Action, Crime, Drama, Adventure
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist makes multiple trips through time to save a woman that was murdered by her brutal husband.

recommendations.title: Bats
recommendations.overview: Genetically mutated bats escape and it's up to a bat expert and the local sheriff to stop them.

recommendations.title: Werewolf: The Beast Among Us
recommendations.overview: Set in a 19th century village, a young man studying under a local doctor joins a team of hunters on the trail of a wolf-like creature.

recommendations.title: Dark Country
recommendations.overview: Two honeymooners rescue a mysterious car crash survivor in the Las Vegas desert. But their decision to save the man becomes increasingly regrettable when he turns on them, forcing the newlyweds to do the unthinkable.

recommendations.title: The Boy Behind the Door
recommendations.overview: Bobby tries to save himself and his best friend when they are kidnapped on their way home from school.

recommendations.title: Bad Samaritan
recommendations.overview: A thief makes a disturbing discovery in the house where he breaks in. Later, when he returns to the same house with his partner in crime, things are no longer how he expected.

recommendations.title: Black Moon Rising
recommendations.overview: An FBI free-lancer stashes a stolen Las Vegas-crime tape in a high-tech car stolen by someone else.

recommendations.title: Prayers for Bobby
